title: lycopodium mannii
intro: Lycopodium mannii, also known as St. John's wort, is a type of evergreen perennial plant that belongs to the club moss family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a popular remedy for wound healing and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Lycopodium mannii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia. In herbal preparations, the plant's dried leaves and stems are often used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are said to promote overall well-being and improve mental clarity.
